mapper.sql: dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.id id, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.gmt_create gmt_create, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.gmt_modified gmt_modified, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.data_source_id data_source_id, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.config_name config_name, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.config_group config_group, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.display display, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.desc_key desc_key, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.value_require value_require, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.value_valid_regex value_valid_regex, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.config_value config_value, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.default_value default_value, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.value_advance value_advance, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.read_only read_only, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.is_secret is_secret, dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.conf_val_type conf_val_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp WHERE dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.data_source_id = #{dsId} AND dm_ds_config_kv_4rdp.config_name = #{configName}
